summary: Comprehensive testing of Reptiloid P2P Exchange admin features: Shop applications, Staff chat, Moderator messages, Test casino API, and Role colors. All 36 backend tests passed. UI verification confirmed all features working correctly.
seed_data_creation: Test messages sent to staff chat and shop application chat
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features tested and working. Shop application 'Premium Digital Store' exists with pending status. Staff chat has test messages from all roles.

1_shop_application_flow.notes: Admin and mod_market can view applications, chat with applicants, set commission. Commission can only be changed by admin after initial set.

2_moderator_messages_to_users.notes: All staff roles (admin, mod_p2p, mod_market, support) can send messages to users

3_moderator_messages_to_staff.notes: Private messaging between staff members working correctly

4_staff_chat_modal.notes: Staff chat modal opens correctly, shows online staff, messages display with correct role colors

5_role_colors_in_chats.notes: Role colors correctly displayed in staff chat modal with legend at bottom

6_test_casino_api.notes: Casino page at /casino allows API key connection, shows merchant balance (1000 USDT), deposit modal works

7_role_access_control.notes: mod_market can access shop applications, mod_p2p cannot. All staff can access staff chat.

ui_verification.admin_panel: Sidebar shows all sections based on role, notifications badges working
ui_verification.shop_applications_page: Shows pending applications with commission input, chat panel, approve/reject buttons
ui_verification.staff_chat_modal: Opens as modal, shows online staff sidebar, messages with role colors, legend at bottom
ui_verification.test_casino: API setup page, login form, casino dashboard with games, deposit modal with P2P integration
